title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Ahmedabad

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Ahmedabad
jsonLd.description:
IIM Ahmedabad, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Ahmedabad:
IIM Ahmedabad is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Ahmedabad!
